form.label: Send Search Results - Delivery Audit
form.description: Audit dashboard for Send Search Results as Excel alert action: executions, generated files, SMTP errors, recipients and recent activity.

search.query: index=_internal source="*sendxlsresults.log" earliest=$time_tok.earliest$ latest=$time_tok.latest$ | rex field=_raw "^(?<log_timestamp>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\s+\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2},\d{3})\s+(?<level>[A-Z]+)\s+(?<message>.*)" | rex field=_raw "invocation_id=(?<invocation_id>[^\s]+)" | rex field=_raw "invocation_type=\"(?<invocation_type>[^\"]+)\"" | rex field=_raw "msg=\"(?<msg>[^\"]+)\"" | rex field=_raw "rcpt=\"(?<recipient>[^\"]+)\"" | rex field=_raw "attachment=\"(?<attachment>[^\"]+)\"" | rex field=_raw "error=\"(?<smtp_error>[^\"]+)\"" | rex field=_raw "outputfile (?<outputfile>\S+)" | rex field=_raw "\((?<smtp_code>\d{3}),\s*b'(?<smtp_text>[^']+)" | eval level=coalesce(level,"UNKNOWN") | eval recipient=coalesce(recipient,"-") | eval msg=coalesce(msg,message) | eval outputfile=coalesce(outputfile,"-") | eval action_status=case( match(_raw,"Email sent successfully"),"sent", match(_raw,"Could not send email"),"failed", match(_raw,"parameters used: outputfile"),"generated", level="ERROR","error", true(),"other" ) | eval smtp_reason=case( match(_raw,"Recipient address rejected"),"Recipient rejected / relay denied", match(_raw,"Sender address rejected"),"Sender rejected / not logged in", match(_raw,"Access denied"),"SMTP access denied", match(_raw,"Connection refused"),"SMTP connection refused", match(_raw,"timed out|TIMEOUT|timeout"),"SMTP timeout", isnotnull(smtp_text),smtp_text, true(),msg ) | where "$level_tok$"="*" OR level="$level_tok$" | where "$status_tok$"="*" OR action_status="$status_tok$" | where "$recipient_tok$"="" OR like(recipient,"%$recipient_tok$%")
| where action_status="failed" OR action_status="error" | stats count
| where action_status="failed" OR action_status="error" | stats count by smtp_reason | sort - count | head 10
| where action_status="failed" AND recipient!="-" | stats count by recipient | sort - count | head 10
| where isnotnull(smtp_code) | stats count values(smtp_text) as smtp_text by smtp_code | sort - count
| where action_status="generated" | table _time invocation_id outputfile | sort - _time | head 20
| where action_status="failed" OR action_status="error" | table _time level invocation_id recipient smtp_code smtp_reason smtp_error | sort - _time | head 30
| table _time level action_status invocation_id recipient msg outputfile smtp_reason | sort - _time | head 50
